# Laws — [Project Name]

## Meta-laws

**[LAW shape]** Laws have slugs, not numbers.
**[LAW cite]** Cite laws as `[LAW <slug>]`.

## Project laws

**[LAW plan]** Plan before you build.
**[LAW confirm]** Confirm before destructive actions.
